## Checklist

- [ ] No new build step or runtime dependency added (this project is intentionally dependency-free)
- [ ] Tested by opening `tracker.html` directly in a browser
- [ ] Works in **both** light and dark themes
- [ ] JSON / data shapes match the existing point schema (`lat`, `lng`, `time`, `note`, `id`, `updatedAt`)
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
